{"society_power": 2.5, "state_power": 2.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "BSA Company rule; two Rhodesias amalgamated in 1911", "reasoning": "Administered by the British South Africa Company with a thin, extractive presence reliant on local chiefs and minimal bureaucracy, so state reach was weak; African society remained organized around fragmented traditional authorities with no autonomous modern associations able to check the Company, keeping both scores low."}
